title: Huawei QSFP-100G-CWDM4-eKit, QSFP28 optical module, Single-Mode, 2km, 100G, LC
description: Huawei QSFP-100G-CWDM4-eKit is a single-mode QSFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 100Gbps , 4 channels, wavelengths 1271nm, 1291nm, 1311nm, 1331nm and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 2km . The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP28 For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 100 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1271 to 1331 Distance [km] 2 Transfer type CWDM Tx power [dBm] 6.5 up to 2.5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 9.8 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
